message:
feat(pijs): fix bunfig loadConfig + registerCommand fn compat, unignore third-party test (bd-22r2)

- bunfig loadConfig now merges with defaultConfig (fixes zenobi-us-pi-dcp)
- registerCommand accepts spec.fn in addition to spec.handler (PiCommand compat)
- Third-party test unignored: 19/19 testable (100%), 4 known-unfixable skipped
  (2 real-FS readFileSync, 2 missing npm packages)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
